title: Ubiquiti UOC-3 - Unifi ODN Cable, 3 Meter
category: Optical networks / Patch cords / Multi Mode
description: Ubiquiti UOC-3 optical patch cord is suitable for connecting active and passive optical elements. Cable is made as multimode with 50/125 (OM3) fibers, 2mm diameter, 3m length and LC-LC duplex connectors
